title: Build Playwright E2E test suite for m4to.com
description: Stand up a Playwright test project in this repo and write end-to-end tests against the live site m4to.com. Research the site first to identify its core user flows, then encode each flow as a test. The suite must be runnable locally with a single command.
acceptance_criteria: Playwright is installed and configured in this repo; `npx playwright test` runs the suite.
Site research identifies m4to.com's core user flows and is reflected in the test plan.
Each identified core flow has at least one Playwright test exercising it against the live site.
The full suite passes locally (green run) at hand-off.

comments.author: backlog-seeder
comments.body: common starter ticket — applies to every fresh project

comments.author: orchestrator
comments.body: Created at human direction: skip CI (TASK-001) and the other seeded placeholder tickets; build Playwright tests for m4to.com instead. Tier uat-only — the deliverable is the test suite itself; verification is a green run plus human confirmation of flow coverage.

comments.author: uat
comments.body:
UAT script (one step per AC), verdicts reported by the human:
1. AC1 — run `npx playwright test`; expected: suite executes and reports 8 passed; observed: 8 passed — PASS.
2. AC2 — open tests/TEST-PLAN.md; expected: documents real site structure (splash gate, SPA routing, randomized persona switcher, EmailJS contact form) with flow→spec mapping; observed: as expected — PASS.
3. AC3 — inspect tests/e2e/ specs; expected: landing load, three external links, persona switcher + contact-modal Back button, and contact-form test with intercepted EmailJS POST (no real submission possible); observed: as expected — PASS.
4. AC4 — green run at hand-off on final commit e3d07c8; expected: 8 passed, tsc clean; observed: 8 passed (1.2m), tsc clean — PASS.
Overall result: PASS (4/4 steps).

comments.author: orchestrator
comments.body: Closed after green review + all-PASS UAT. Researcher mapped m4to.com (client-rendered SPA, 'Rafael Matovello - Multiverse Portfolio'). Developer scaffolded Playwright+TS, ran live DOM discovery, and delivered 8 tests across landing/navigation/buttons/contact-form; contact form is asserted boundary-only with all non-GET requests intercepted (EmailJS backend) so no real email can be sent. Reviewer independently reproduced the green run and assessed all 4 ACs MET; the MEDIUM finding (serviceWorkers: 'block' hardening) plus two locator nits were fixed in e3d07c8. Knowledge-graph decision→task edges skipped: src/knowledge-graph.js does not exist in this project.
